items.caption: A slide from a presentation, focusing on the design of a voice recorder. the slide is titled "designing the voice recorder" and provides an example of a form page from page 397 of a text. the form is presented in a table format with columns for "from state," "events," and "to state." each row in the table represents a transition rule for the voice recorder, with the "from state" and "to state" columns detailing the states involved in the transition. the "events" column lists the events that trigger the transition, such as "off," "on," "play," "record," "stop," and "erase." the "more transition rules" section at the bottom of the slide outlines additional rules for the voice recorder, including the transition from an "error-msq state" to an "error-msq state" and the transition from an "error-msq state" to a "display message" and "automatically transitions to stop state." the slide is designed with a clean, professional layout, using a combination of black and yellow text on a white background.
